bannerTwo.title: Dedicated Server Hosting
bannerTwo.description: Get all the raw performance of the server for your resource-intensive websites & applications

pricing.title: Choose The Best Dedicated Server Plan
pricing.description: Experience ultra-fast loading speeds globally for seamless performance and reliability anywhere in the world.

hostingThree.title: Maximum Performance, Total Control
hostingThree.description: Next-level Performance and Reliability with Simplified Management

items.title: Powerful Configurations
items.description: Our servers are powered by SSD storage, DDR4 Memory and Xenon D processors, and can smoothly handle any type of workload - from a critical business application to a high-traffic website.

items.title: Quick Provisioning
items.description: We get you online quickly. Your server is provisioned within minutes.

items.title: Server Administration Panel
items.description: Never lose access to your server. Our Server Administration Panel gives you total control at all times. With features like Rebuild, Web-based VNC, Restart, Shutdown and Resource Monitoring you can manage your server easily.

items.title: Additional Storage*
items.description: Our HDD servers come with the flexibility of additional storage. You can easily scale the storage as your business grows.

items.title: Easily Configurable
items.description: Choose from multiple Linux flavours and hosting panels. You can even add WHMCS add-on to have a complete billing solution.

items.title: 99.99% uptime
items.description: Our servers are located a top-tier data centres which are backed by redundant ISP links and Neustar DDoS protection to ensure your site is up and available all the time.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Find quick answers to the most common questions about our hosting plans, services, and features.

items.question: Which hosting control panels do you offer?
items.answer: You can buy Plesk or cPanel license during the server purchase, or at a later time when the need arises.

items.question: Which billing panels do you offer?
items.answer: We offer WHMCS as a billing panel for your dedicated server. You can purchase the license from us at a minimal cost and install the application on your dedicated server.

items.question: What are the functions of the Server Administration Panel?
items.answer: Every server comes with its Server Administration Panel by default. This panel allows you to carry out crucial server administration tasks and monitor resource consumption like GUI-based CPU, Memory, Storage & Inodes utilisation, IPs and Storage (for HDD servers only) details and functions to Rebuild, Restart, Web-based VNC and reset access credentials.

items.question: Can I configure my own RAID for drives?
items.answer: The Dedicated Servers come pre-configured with RAID 1. At present, we do not allow customisation of RAID level. Would love to hear about such new features requests to help us serve you better.

items.question: What is the port speed of the server?
items.answer: The server uplink port speed is up to 1 Gbps.

items.question: How long does it take for the server to be ready?
items.answer: After the payment, your server will be provisioned in about 30 minutes and you can access it via SSH. The disk resize operation, however, may still run in the background for a while after provisioning.

items.question: What is the level of support that you provide with the server?
items.answer: To ensure high uptime and accessibility at all times, we are available 24x7 for any hardware, network, booting, O.S. or login issues. Our System Administration Support will also assist you with basic cPanel & Firewall setup and their issues.

items.question: Is Additional Storage available for all server configurations?
items.answer: At present, the additional storage feature is only available with our HDD servers in the US data centre. Would love to hear about such new features requests to help us serve you better.

items.question: Can I use a Dedicated Server for email marketing?
items.answer: Dedicated Servers can be used for Websites, Databases, Custom Applications, Ecommerce, DNS, File Storage and Emails. Emails, however, must be restricted to personal, organisational or professional purposes. The use of Dedicated Servers to send out mass emails/marketing is not recommended and can attract penalties.

items.question: Can I use virtualisation software on the server?
items.answer: Our Dedicated Servers are virtualised (1:1). Thus, nested virtualisation will not work due to network restrictions on the host system.

items.question: Do you provide any backup service?
items.answer: We do not have any backup solution at the moment. Yet, we strongly recommend that you maintain a remote backup to avoid any hassles during any ill-fated incident.
